customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals detected. Customer is warm, self-motivated, and arrived with a clear use case. Primary risk is not resistance — it is the closer walking in underprepared on bill data and roof age.
unresolved_concerns: Bill amount is an unverified customer estimate, not a captured bill. Transcript reads '$2.02 2 to $2.50' — likely $200–$250 but Deepgram transcription introduces ambiguity and the figure is the customer's guess, not a statement from an actual bill. Closer should collect the actual bill at appointment start. NOTE: if this is a paid lead, the appointment may not be sit-eligible without a confirmed bill — verify lead type in CRM before the appointment.

Roof age was never collected. Customer moved in one month ago and does not know the roof's history. Closer should check roof age early — it is a potential hard DQ per codex if over 15 years with no replacement planned.

Tax credit expectation: rep presented the tax incentive as a straightforward benefit without the codex-required caveat that Ion can no longer guarantee it on purchased systems. Closer should manage expectations proactively.
sensitive_topics_raised: Husband is active or retired military — customer referenced military spouse benefits and potential government discounts. Husband is not on title but is present in the household. Closer should acknowledge the military connection and address any discount question directly.
Customer is traveling on the appointment date (Tuesday the second) — confirmed at 03:39. Closer should confirm the customer will be at a computer and not driving before beginning the proposal review.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for Tuesday the second at 2:30 PM.
One hour blocked for the appointment.
Specialist may be able to address military/government discount — rep said 'maybe in the appointment if you just wanna ask.'
closer_should_know: This customer is genuinely motivated — new home, pool, gas cost pain, long-standing interest in solar. She will not need to be sold on the concept. The closer's job is to show her the math on her specific home. Collect the actual bill and roof age at the top of the call before building the proposal.
